items.title: [正面] Game is pretty sweet, cool lovecraft-style horror ...
items.summary:
Game is pretty sweet, cool lovecraft-style horror theme, well done characters.
The gameplay is very fun. If you like Slay the Spire style, you'd like this.
As you go on it gets more challenging. I've played up to about chapter 4 of 9.
I don't play much gatcha but the gatcha mechanics don't seem egregious and they do give you decent starter characters for doing the story with.

If you like here is my invite code: HZLQU1M79Y

:D

items.summary:
게임 재밌고 스토리도 흥미로운데 번역이 진짜... 다크한 분위기가 아니라 번역된 내용을 다시 머릿속에서 해석해야 하는 것 때문에 정신력 빨림
그치만 재미는 있어요

items.title: [正面] Finally a gacha game that respects its playerbase ...
items.summary:
Finally a gacha game that respects its playerbase and make you feel appreciated. 

I was looking so bad for a turn-based gacha I even re-downloaded Honkai. Hated it and deleted it on the same day.

Morimens? Morimens is fun, the characters are complex, combat is what you would expect from such a game. It is generous with free resources and pulls in comparison to other gacha games. The community is friendly and helpful, there are many community made guides to assist you along the way if you need that extra push.

And for the ladies, [spoiler]it is also Love and Deepspace from Lidl - you can select your favourite husband (or wife) material to look at on the menu page and click on them.[/spoiler] Hehe.

And at the end of the day, it is free. Try it out!

TL;DR: Pull Blue.

items.title: [正面] Lovecraft + Slay the Spire. ♥♥♥♥♥ a fun game but b...
items.summary: Lovecraft + Slay the Spire. ♥♥♥♥♥ a fun game but beware it is gacha and they had to use MTL translation for the story to save the game. They are now going back and re-translating the rest of the game.
